Video.summary: If you like extreme high-flying action, the Metrodome is the place to be! Fifteen of the biggest and baddest monster trucks take the stage in Minneapolis with freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Next on the list is Raymond James Stadium for the 2016 Monster Jam Championship Series tour.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: The Huntington Center in Toledo, OH is ground zero for Arena Championship Series East action featuring: Weston Anderson in Grave Digger, Linsey Read in Scooby-Doo, Armando Castro in El Toro Loco, Dalton Widner in Jurassic Attack, Bernard Lyght in Megalodon, Hunter Souza in Earth Shaker, Chad Tingler in Zombie, and Frank Krmel in Stone Crusher.
Video.title: Huntington Center - Toledo, OH

Video.summary: Monster Jam returns to Oracle Park in San Francisco as Bari Musawwir looks to lead Zombie to back-to-back event wins. Can Kayla Blood recover from electrical issues that plagued Solider Fortune’s Series debut? Will inconsistencies continue to drive the Anderson Brothers out of the top spot? It’s round 3, it’s Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series West.
Video.title: Oracle Park - San Francisco, CA

Video.summary: Day two of Monster Jam's 2021 season stop in St. Louis, MO continues with more trucks and more fun!
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: As the points series resumes, Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson looks to clinch the Red series title and secure a spot at World Finals XXII, while Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy makes one last stand to stay in the hunt and capture his first series championship.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA

Video.summary: Day two in East Rutherford continues at MetLife stadium with the freestyle competition.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

Image.alt: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

Video.summary: It's another jam-packed show with your favorite trucks and drivers competing with freestyle action from the Edward Jones Dome, on February 12, 2005.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2001 season revs back into the Superdome in New Orleans with freestyle chaos.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Video.summary: The Tampa fans get another day of excitement as the next round of the Monster Jam series continues.
Video.title: Amalie Arena - Tampa, FL - Part 2

Video.summary: Don't miss the racing and freestyle action from Qualcomm Stadium, on January 23, 2010.
Video.title: Qualcomm Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from Angel Stadium on February 22, 2020.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Catch up with the exciting freestyle Monster Jam action from Reliant Stadium, on January 8, 2011.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out the exciting Monster Jam racing action from Lincoln Financial Field, on June 9, 2012.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Racing

Image.alt: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Racing
Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Racing
Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Racing

Video.summary: All the Racing and Freestyle action from AT&T Stadium on February 19, 2015.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes around the world in this exciting special!
Video.title: International Show

Video.summary: Back at the GelreDome in Holland, Monster Jam's trucks compete for victory on September 30, 2012.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Holland

Video.summary: Check out all your favorite trucks and drivers competing in all racing and freestyle action from the Louisiana Superdome, on January 30, 2010.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season at Angel Stadium in Anaheim, CA featuring Championship race and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season revs into Sam Boyd Stadium in Las Vegas, NV for some fun and excitement!
Video.title: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Image.alt: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season continues at Everbank Field in Jacksonville, FL with even more racing and freestyle action!
Video.title: Everbank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Your favorite Monster Jam trucks and drivers bring the excitement into Orlando, FL with racing, skills, and freestyle action.
Video.title: Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Don't miss this epic compilation of the best freestyle run moments from 2019.
Video.title: Best of Freestyle Runs - 2019

Video.summary: Monster Jam World Finals 2025 was a night to remember, especially for champions Blake Granger, Todd LeDuc, Tristan England, and Ryan Anderson. Watch their winning runs here and their 2025 season highlights that led them to the World Finals championship!
Video.title: Best of World Finals 2025 Champions

Video.summary: Watch Monster Jam World Finals freestyle action with drivers like Rihanna Mahan, Lindsay Reed, Camden Murphy, Ryan Anderson, and more.
Video.title: Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation

Image.alt: Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation
Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation
Top Scored Freestyles Of The Last 5 World Finals Compilation

Video.summary: This epic compilation covers "The Professor" himself- Tom Meents over the years of 2000-2011.
Video.title: Best of Tom Meents

Video.summary: The competition heats up during freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals X on March 28, 2009.

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2008 season comes to a close with all the racing action from Monster Jam World Finals 9 on March 29, 2008.
